title: 宝塚記念の後に・君はもう――

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'm back.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But... um...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No, no, I'm fine!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's just... Hayahide's drive was so strong, I don't
really get how I won. My head feels all fuzzy and
confused...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I felt a similar thing with Taishin before at the
Osaka Hai, but today it was like both of them
were totally different people.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And, you know... I wonder if I really belong with
them.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, geez, what am I saying? I can't be getting
soft like this!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I've been trying so hard to make the races I run
incredible too—my motivation isn't any less than
theirs!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll just have to try even harder and deliver a race
that's even bigger and more exciting next time!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I believe that's what you were saying before the
race as well.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide! We had such an amazing race today! I
could feel your intensity!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Let's always be rivals and keep running the best
races!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Hmm.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You have every right to mock me for saying this
after how poorly I performed today, but...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Right now, I'm afraid I can't see you as a rival.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Taishin would probably say the same.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wh-wha... But... hold on a sec!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Why?! We've always run together! We had such a
good competition at the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
True. At the Derby we most definitely were each
other's rivals.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But... not now.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Not now? I ran such a good race today! Just like
at the Derby...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No, Ticket—it wasn't the same. Something was
very different.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And if you can't even recognize that fact... then
you truly aren't my rival anymore.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
When I set foot on the track, I'm not just trying to
put on a "great race" for the audience.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you think good and long about what
you're really racing for?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wait... Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm... not her rival anymore? And what's she mean,
"think about why I race"?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I just... I want to run great races with my rivals,
and make the audience feel excited.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Is that... wrong?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Winning Ticket mutters to herself, I can see
her shoulders trembling a little.
